strategic_vision.title: The Sovereign Agent
strategic_vision.year_1: Assistant: AI helps user do their work.
strategic_vision.year_5: Sovereign: AI represents the user in the digital world cryptographically.
strategic_vision.paradigm_shift: The future internet will be dominated by machine-to-machine interactions, so a personal AI must gain secure sovereign capabilities to act on the user's behalf.

roadmap_tracks.name: Voice & Ambient Interfaces
roadmap_tracks.goal: Move from turn-based chat into low-latency real-time voice and opt-in ambient capture.
target_capabilities: Wearable integrations with explicit consent and edge trigger detection
implementation_notes: Use explicit permission flows before recording physical conversations.
Keep ambient audio disabled by default.
Prefer edge filtering so irrelevant private audio is never uploaded.

roadmap_tracks.name: Sovereign Digital Identity
roadmap_tracks.goal: Give each agent cryptographic identity and verifiable authority to represent the user.
target_capabilities: Limited pre-authorized keys for micro-transactions and signatures
implementation_notes: Never grant broad custody over user assets.
Require explicit approval for high-risk signing and financial actions.
Treat DID/VC support as an advanced opt-in identity layer.

roadmap_tracks.name: AI-to-AI Protocols & Negotiation
roadmap_tracks.goal: Enable trusted machine-to-machine communication, scheduling, delegation, and marketplace negotiation.
target_capabilities: AP-HANDSHAKE for DID verification and trust constraints
AP-NEGOTIATE for calendar, schedule, and pricing alignment
External marketplace bidding with user confirmation
implementation_notes: Start with scheduling negotiation before financial transactions.
Log all agent-to-agent actions to audit logs.
Present top options to the user before irreversible external commitments.

roadmap_tracks.name: Memory Portability & Open Standards
roadmap_tracks.goal: Guarantee user-owned memories that can move to any compliant runtime.
target_capabilities: Graph archive with provenance and relations

open_memory_format_example.statement: User prefers dark mode first in design

roadmap_tracks.name: Decentralized Multi-Agent Collaboration Networks
roadmap_tracks.goal: Allow personal agents to collaborate securely and use decentralized compute where appropriate.
target_capabilities: zkML verification for untrusted hardware execution
Project-scoped shared memory with strict isolation
Private state channels for collaborative work
implementation_notes: Do not send raw private user memory to untrusted compute.
Use decentralized execution only for tasks that can be privacy-preserved or independently verified.
Keep shared memory scoped to explicit projects.

north_star.title: The Cognitive Extension
north_star.description: At year 5, the personal AI agent is no longer just an app; it becomes a cognitive extension of the human.
characteristics: Zero-latency alignment with >95% intent prediction accuracy
Cryptographic sovereignty where platform operators cannot decrypt the user memory graph
Economic agency for approved earning, spending, contracting, and negotiation
Eternal memory that archives noise and preserves lifelong knowledge

strategic_decisions.rationale: Bypasses traditional HTTP request/response loops and enables real conversational intervention.
Replaces email/password as a native trust anchor for agent-to-agent networks.
Allows heavy agent execution on decentralized compute without exposing tenant data.
Positions the product as a trusted, non-custodial steward instead of a data prison.
Enables a native machine economy where agents exchange value to solve subtasks.

near_term_bridge.why_it_matters_now: The current MVP should make architectural choices that do not block sovereignty later.
do_now: Preserve audit logs for agent actions.
Keep production readiness checks in place.
Avoid locking data to a single vector or model provider.
